statusLine.command: cols=${COLUMNS:-}; case "$cols" in ""|*[!0-9]*) cols=$(stty size </dev/tty 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}');; esac; case "$cols" in ""|*[!0-9]*) cols=120;; esac; export COLUMNS=$(( cols > 4 ? cols - 4 : 1 )); plugin_dir=$(ls -1d "${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"/plugins/cache/*/claude-hud/*/ 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1); exec "$(command -v node)" "${plugin_dir}dist/index.js"
